content.text:
Perfect! Now the output shows:
- Position of 'Comment': 131
- Position of 'Why am I here?': 193
- "Search text after comment: true"

This means that "Why am I here?" now appears AFTER "Comment" in the rendered output, which is exactly what the test expects. The fix is working correctly!
